resources.string:
NEXUZYAI — PRIVACY POLICY Last updated: March 2026
1. NO DATA COLLECTION NexuzyAI does not collect, store, transmit, or share any personal data. This includes but is not limited to: conversation history, voice recordings, location data, device identifiers, usage statistics, or any other personal information.
2. ON-DEVICE PROCESSING All AI inference runs entirely on your device using the Qwen3 language model via MLC-LLM. Your conversations never leave your phone. No server receives your messages.
3. LOCATION Location access (GPS) is used only to provide contextual answers (e.g. local weather). Location data is processed locally and is never transmitted to any server.
4. MICROPHONE Microphone access is used only for voice input via Android SpeechRecognizer. Voice processing is handled by your device\u2019s built-in speech recognition. We do not record, store, or transmit audio.
5. INTERNET ACCESS The app uses internet access only for: \u2022 Fetching weather data from Open-Meteo (anonymous, no personal data) \u2022 Fetching news headlines from Google News RSS (anonymous) \u2022 Displaying Google AdMob ads (governed by Google\u2019s privacy policy) \u2022 Optional: downloading model weights on first launch
6. ADVERTISING NexuzyAI uses Google AdMob for advertising. Ads may use your device\u2019s advertising ID as governed by Google\u2019s Privacy Policy. You can opt out via Android Settings \u2192 Google \u2192 Ads.
7. OPEN SOURCE NexuzyAI is fully open source. You can inspect all source code at: https://github.com/david0154/NexuzyAI-Android
8. CHILDREN\u2019S PRIVACY We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13. Since we collect no data at all, this app is safe for all ages.
9. CHANGES If this policy changes, the updated version will be posted in the GitHub repository and within the app.
10. CONTACT For any privacy concerns: \u2022 nexuzylab@gmail.com \u2022 davidk76011@gmail.com
Developed by David \u2022 Managed by Nexuzy Lab MIT License \u00a9 2025\u20132026
